title: cornus mas f. flava
intro: Cornus mas f. flava, also known as the Yellow Cornelian Cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Cornus genus. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, leaves, and fruits, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Cornus mas f. flava have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Cornus mas f. flava is often prepared in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system, relieve coughs and colds, and promote overall well-being.
